producer.origin: elara-mesh maintainer receipts feed — act 019f7856-87a7-7823-8ed5-336dcb48961e; assembled from /record/{id}/wire: the signed act record + an epoch seal current at snapshot time (on today's single-zone mesh that is the zone-0 seal; per-act zone resolution lands with multi-zone). Record-to-seal chain binding needs the inclusion leg, which this envelope does not carry — the verifier grades that honestly. Self-declared, like every producer field.
